title: arenaria longifolia var. parviflora
intro: Arenaria longifolia var. parviflora, also known as small-flowered sandwort, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Arenaria longiflora var. parviflora include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as possibly helping to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from the roots, leaves, or flowers, and can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions.
